chunks.text: That brother, every 2 hours or every 3 hours, you have to drink a glass of water.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: Drink water, take a break and take care of your health.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: Write a Python program which reminds you of drinking water every hour or two.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: Every hour or two.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: Your program can either beep or send desktop notifications for a specific operating system.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: Now why did I write this for a specific operating system?

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: Because what happens is that if you are making for Mac, then it may not work in Windows.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: If you are making for Windows, then it may not work in Mac.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: Although you can detect from the OS module which platform is which.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: And you can run the code according to the platform.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: I am not expecting so much advance from you at this point.

chunks.title: Exercise 11 - Drink Water Reminder
chunks.text: You just have to make it for one operating system.
